motto: After Ironclad seals, every die folds into one CHIPS core — ironclad_chips + plate_stack → chips_core.

equations.rearrangement: O maximal when plate weights wᵢ = path_pct·steel_boost·bsp_boost and slot ranks rank(s) are similarly sorted (rearrangement inequality)

posture: CHIPS core sealed — 974 dies → 138 core modules (7.1× condense)
